title: Fix canonical event name consistency issues
consumer_purpose: Eliminate hardcoded event type strings in state-machine.ts in favor of canonical EventName constants; fix SG-004 prefix violation; register 8 missing event names in the canonical EventName registry.
claim_atoms: All 21 hardcoded event type strings in state-machine.ts replaced with EventName constants
8 missing event name constants added to event-names.ts registry
SG-004 CampaignLaneCreated prefix fixed to campaign.* (pre-existing dirty fix — already applied)

status.event-names.ts: dirty — SG-004 and GatesAllPassed already applied by prior lane
status.state-machine.ts: dirty — partial EventName conversion without import (broken state)

root_causes.hypothesis: CampaignLaneCreated was defined as 'lane.created' instead of 'campaign.lane.created', breaking the campaign.* prefix convention followed by all other campaign events
evidence: All 11 other campaign.* constants use 'campaign.' prefix
Already fixed in dirty file (line 98 now: 'campaign.lane.created')

root_causes.hypothesis: state-machine.ts evaluatePredicate and transition specs use 21 hardcoded event type strings instead of EventName constants. 8 of those strings had no corresponding constant in EventName registry. This creates a fragile single-source-of-truth violation.
evidence: 21 unique hardcoded strings found via grep: session.checkpoint, lane.returned, edit.applied (x2), validation.completed (x2), claims.acquired (x2), claim.conflict, permission.denied, user.approval, context.sufficient, scope.unsafe, validation.failure (x2), children.all_complete, child.blocked, finding.blocking, finding.confirmed, plan.produced, plan.approved, plan.rejected, scout.completed, scope.synthesized, gates.all_passed
13 of these have existing EventName constants
8 are missing: session.checkpoint, lane.returned, claims.acquired, scope.unsafe, children.all_complete, finding.blocking, finding.confirmed, gates.all_passed (last one already added by prior lane)

edits.description: Add 7 missing constants (GatesAllPassed already added by prior lane)

operations.location: in child.* section (after ChildCompleted, around LaneCompleted/LaneBlocked)
operations.after_context:
ChildBlocked: 'child.blocked',
  ChildCompleted: 'child.completed',
  ChildrenAllComplete: 'children.all_complete',
  LaneCompleted: 'lane.completed',
  LaneBlocked: 'lane.blocked',
  LaneReturned: 'lane.returned',
  ClaimConflict: 'claim.conflict',

import { checkPredicate } from "./predicates"
import { EventName } from "../event"

edits.description: Replace all remaining hardcoded event type strings with EventName constants. Existing conversions (ValidationCompleted, ValidationFailure, ScopeSynthesized) left as-is.
Use canonical EventName.CampaignLaneCreated instead of hardcoded string

risks.description: CampaignLaneCreated value change from 'lane.created' to 'campaign.lane.created' affects runtime event type. Any code matching on 'lane.created' would break.
risks.mitigation: Grep confirmed only 2 references: event-names.ts (the constant) and secretary.ts line 131 (being updated). No other consumers exist.

risks.description: state-machine.ts currently broken — uses EventName.* without import. Adding the import fixes the break but may expose other type errors.
risks.mitigation: Run bun typecheck after all edits. If type errors surface, they were pre-existing and not caused by this change.

risks.description: Prior lane's partial work could have unintended side effects or missing pieces.
risks.mitigation: Diff shows only additive string changes and predicate kind reordering. No logic changes. Verify with git diff post-edit.

validation: bun typecheck from packages/opencode (must pass with zero errors)
node -e on event-names.ts to confirm all 8 new constants exist
observations: secretary.ts toSMEvent function (lines 133-179) has ~23 hardcoded event type strings that should be converted to EventName constants in a follow-up lane
secretary.ts line 177 uses hardcoded 'lane.returned' — should use EventName.LaneReturned after this mission adds it
event-names.ts 'SessionIdle' constant (line 19) is marked # deprecated — remove in Phase 4
rollback: Revert each edit in reverse order: secretary.ts → state-machine.ts string replacements → state-machine.ts import → event-names.ts constant additions
